prevalence.trend: increasing with aging and chronic lung disease

burden.dalyPerCapita: high in advanced disease; right heart failure burden
burden.mortalityRate: Moderate to high in advanced cases

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Echocardiography screening; confirm with right heart catheterization and hemodynamic criteria

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; access to PH centers varies

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Echocardiography available; right heart catheterization limited to referral centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Treat underlying cause; PAH therapy with PDE5 inhibitors/endothelin antagonists in select centers
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited specialized centers and schistosomiasis-associated disease
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Growing PH referral networks and access to generic sildenafil
